summary: Memory-keeper specialization for writeback checks and local memory candidates.
meaning: Use this specialization when the memory-keeper must inspect provenance and prepare a local memory candidate while leaving durable memory authority with aoa-memo.
activation_triggers: A meaningful topology, route-law, or workflow change needs writeback judgment.
Session evidence must be preserved as a candidate rather than treated as canon.
A closeout needs explicit memory-worthy or no-writeback reasoning.
projection_notes: May project as memory-keeper-writeback-steward, but source remains inside the memory-keeper role house.
Projection may prepare candidates but must not grant durable promotion rights by default.
stop_lines: Do not promote, demote, retire, or rewrite durable memory truth through this specialization.
Do not write outside a repo-local memory candidate route.
